archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury mixed with Retro-Futurism/Terminal Tech

design_vision.visual_mood: Deep space void with glowing high-contrast data overlays.

typography.hierarchy_rules: Use tracking-tight for headings, tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for small labels. Keep headings expressive and data monospaced.

layout_spacing.strategy: The entire app is a full-screen immersive canvas. The 3D globe is centered and takes up the background. UI elements (AI chat, lists, video bar) are absolutely positioned floating panels overlaying the canvas.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.floating_panels: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]. Do NOT use pure flat black. Always add a 1px border for crisp edges.

components.globe_3d: Use react-globe.gl. Set globe background to transparent. Configure globeImageUrl with a dark map style or solid dark colors. Show country borders subtly. Implement interactive dots: glowing yellow (#E8FF00) for UAP sightings, glowing cyan (#00F0FF) for satellites.
components.background_stars: Create a pure CSS or lightweight Canvas starfield (black background with randomly scattered white dots of varying opacities) behind the 3D globe.
components.ai_chat_interface: A sleek floating panel or command-palette style input overlaid on the screen. Use mono font for AI typing effects. Glowing active states.
components.buttons: Tech style: 1px solid border-white/20, hover:border-white/60 with subtle text glow. No heavy filled backgrounds unless it is the primary CTA.
components.video_bar: Fixed at bottom. Horizontal scroll container with hidden scrollbar. Video thumbnails should have hover scale-up effects.
components.lists: Dense data lists for UAP/Satellites inside glass panels. Use monospace fonts for coordinates, altitudes, or timestamps.

motion.interactions: Hover states must brighten text and borders. The globe must auto-rotate slowly but stop immediately upon user click/interaction.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up and slight translation for lists.

video_thumbnails.description: moon seen through trees at night
white bird flying through dark sky
full moon in dark night sky

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over glassmorphism meets APCA contrast standards. Use text-shadow for added legibility over complex globe areas.
accessibility.testing: MUST add data-testid attributes to all buttons, list items, AI chat inputs, and video thumbnails.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL react-globe.gl and three.js for the 3D globe component.
INSTALL lucide-react for all iconography (satellites, ufos, etc).
FETCH and apply Google Fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.

BUILD a full-screen layout. The base layer is a CSS starfield (black bg, white dots). The middle layer is the react-globe.gl component. The top layer consists of absolute-positioned floating glassmorphism panels.
IMPLEMENT the AI Chat Agent either as a floating side panel or a bottom-left command window.
CONFIGURE globe markers: UAP reports should cast a fluorescent yellow glow (#E8FF00). Satellites should be cyan (#00F0FF).
ENSURE all floating lists (UAP, Anomalous, Satellites) use the Crystal Glassmorphism theme (backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-black/60, border border-white/10).
The horizontal video bar should be fixed at the bottom with overflow-x-auto, styled elegantly so it doesn't block the globe.
Remember to include data-testid on all interactive elements as per the testing rules.
